## 🎉 Welcome to SahiDawa! 🩺

Hi @{author}, thanks for making your very first interaction with **SahiDawa** 🇮🇳

To get started smoothly:

---

### 🛠️ 1. Quick Setup

SahiDawa is a monorepo built with Next.js, Express, and FastAPI.

- **Frontend Setup (`apps/web`):** Run `npm install` and `npm run dev` to get the Next.js PWA running on `localhost:3000`.
- **Backend Setup (`apps/api`):** Run `npm install` and `npm run dev` to start the Node.js API server on `localhost:4000`.
- **ML Service Setup (`apps/ml`):** Read our [ML Setup Guide](https://github.com/RatLoopz/sahidawa-india/blob/main/docs/getting-started/ml-setup.md) to activate the Python environment and run Whisper + TF Lite models.

For a full step-by-step installation guide, please read the [**README.md**](https://github.com/RatLoopz/sahidawa-india/blob/main/README.md) and [**CONTRIBUTING.md**](https://github.com/RatLoopz/sahidawa-india/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).

---

### 🌿 2. Branch Naming

- `feat/your-feature-name` ➔ For new features or updates
- `fix/bug-description` ➔ For resolving issues or fixing bugs
- `docs/doc-updates` ➔ For documentation changes
- `test/test-description` ➔ For adding or correcting test suites

---

### 📋 3. Before Opening a PR

1. Open a PR with `Closes #123`.
2. Test changes locally
3. No Redundant Files: Don't commit temp files (`.env`, `node_modules`, build folders).
4. Code Quality: Ensure all lints and code format checks pass successfully.

---

### 💬 4. Connect with the Community

- 📢 **Join our Discord:** [Click here to join SahiDawa Discord](https://discord.gg/dvbDuJVwNa) for instant maintainer support and live discussions.
- 💬 **GitHub Discussions:** Head over to our [Discussions Tab](https://github.com/RatLoopz/sahidawa-india/discussions) to brainstorm new features or ask architecture questions.

Thank you for joining SahiDawa ❤️🩺
